title: bidens elliotii
intro: Bidens elliotii, also known as Elliot's beggar-ticks, is a plant species belonging to the aster family (Asteraceae). The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The leaves and stems of Bidens elliotii have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to alleviate symptoms and promote healing.
